state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 for DOD-optimized .3dm mesh translation and stabilize the CI/CD infrastructure for cross-platform reliability.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **Build/Tooling**: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, C++17, Static Runtime (/MT). No MSVC `cl.exe`. - **VCPKG Resolution**: Overlay ports MUST be resolved via `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` in `CMakeLists.txt` targeting the specific `ports/` subdirectory. - **CI/CD Enforcements**: Windows runners must install Ninja via Chocolatey (`choco install ninja`); Ubuntu runners must install `ninja-build clang lld`. - **Coding Mandates**: STRICT Allman style; Data-Oriented Design (DOD); Branchless logic; Zero heap allocations in hot loops; Restrict STL (use `std::array` or raw arrays; no `std::vector` resizing in main loop). - **OpenGL**: Version 400 Core. Use `GL_RGBA16F` for G-Buffers. No `::` prefix for GL functions. Include `glad/glad.h` and `GLFW/glfw3.h` BEFORE `AliceViewer.h`. - **Aesthetics**: Background `0.9`. Deep Charcoal (`#2D2D2D`) geometry. Window Title: `"ALICE CAD ON FRAMEWORK"`.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **vcpkg Baseline**: `a9f0cd0345fb29cd227d802f1fd1917c28f8e5a3`. - **openNURBS Version**: `8.24.25281.15003` (via overlay and version override). - **Overlay Subpath**: `VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS` must point to the directory containing the port folders (e.g., `${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/vcpkg-overlay-ports/ports`) to be correctly ingested by manifest mode. - **Linker Requirements**: Static linkage of openNURBS on Windows requires `shlwapi.lib` and `zlib.lib`. - **Two-Pass Extraction**: Implemented in `RhinoIO.h` to satisfy the "Zero heap allocations in hot loops" mandate by pre-counting geometry before arena allocation.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/RhinoIO.h`: Single-header implementation updated with `RhinoModel` structure and two-pass extraction for Meshes, Points, and Curves. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Configured as a switchboard for `RHINO_IO_RUN_TEST` to facilitate immediate verification via F5. - `build/`: Cleanly regenerated with `clang-cl` for both C and C++ frontends, ensuring toolchain consistency.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b\Documents\REPOS\alice-viewer - openNurbs` - COMPILER: `C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/clang-cl.exe` (C and CXX) - NINJA: `C:\Users\shajay.b\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\ninja.exe` - STATE: Build directory wiped and regenerated (0 errors).
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Implemented point and curve extraction in `RhinoIO.h` using a DOD-friendly two-pass strategy. - Verified local build success using the LLVM/Ninja toolchain. - Configured `src/sketch.cpp` for unit testing the Rhino IO module. - Wiped and regenerated the build environment to ensure a clean state for the human developer.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Setup vcpkg overlay ports for openNURBS 8.x. 2. [DONE] Implement single-header `RhinoIO.h` with `ONX_Model` translation. 3. [DONE] Fix CI/CD infrastructure (Ninja installation and overlay pathing). 4. [DONE] Verify mesh extraction with a valid .3dm file. 5. [DONE] Add support for Curve and Point translation. 6. [DONE] Complete SOP steps 7-9 (Build, Handoff, State Compression).
